query:
UPDATE products SET imageUrl = CASE 
  WHEN id = 5730001 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1515562141207-7a88fb7ce338?w=600&q=80'
  WHEN id = 5730002 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1599643478518-a784e5dc4c8f?w=600&q=80'
  WHEN id = 5730003 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535632066927-ab7c9ab60908?w=600&q=80'
  WHEN id = 5730004 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1515562141207-6811bcb33ce7?w=600&q=80'
  WHEN id = 5730005 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1602173574767-37ac01994b2a?w=600&q=80'
  WHEN id = 5730006 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506630448388-4e683c67ddb0?w=600&q=80'
  WHEN id = 5730007 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1617038260897-41a1f14a8ca0?w=600&q=80'
  WHEN id = 5730008 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1603561591411-07134e71a2a9?w=600&q=80'
  WHEN id = 5730009 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1589128777073-263566ae5e4d?w=600&q=80'
  WHEN id = 5730010 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1599643478518-a784e5dc4c8f?w=600&q=80'
  ELSE imageUrl
END;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.f21199908ec6 --database Fb7vXnzeJhLwFywj8Ci5L6 --execute UPDATE products SET imageUrl = CASE 
  WHEN id = 5730001 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1515562141207-7a88fb7ce338?w=600&q=80'

  WHEN id = 5730008 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1603561591411-07134e71a2a9?w=600&q=80'
